name: RTG Mining Limited
description: RTG Mining Inc. is a mining and exploration company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and the Australian Securities Exchange. The company is primarily focused on the development of the Mabilo Project, a high-grade gold and copper asset, with the goal of transitioning into a producing mining company. Led by an experienced management team with a track record of developing seven mines across five countries, RTG also maintains a portfolio of exploration and development opportunities, including the Panguna Project in Bougainville, Papua New Guinea, and the Chanach Project in Kyrgyzstan.
